batch_summary.dominant_tone: low-moderate conflict — Phase A late period (Jan-Feb 2025); one major contempt/DARVO cluster Jan 15 (ROW-7714-7749) with inadequate-father peak ('You are completely useless as a father. I stand by that.'); child guilt relay mid-cluster; ADD-002 slur ('stupid ass' ROW-7722); Feb 4 child abandonment relay peripheral; remainder cooperative logistics
batch_summary.rf04_activity: moderate — 1 Sev-2 primary (Jan 15 mega-cluster); ADD-002 new slur instance; peak inadequate-father characterization in dataset to date; DARVO gaslight-inversion pattern; ARC-RF04-002 child guilt weapon; COMP-RF04-019 (RF-04+RF-09)
batch_summary.notable_context: Jan 15 cluster (ROW-7714-7749): triggered by scheduling dispute; escalates to peak inadequate-father statement ('completely useless as a father'); multiple 'gaslight' accusations deployed as DARVO mechanism to reframe Eli's communication as manipulation; 'Stop your behavior and act like a dad and responsible adult and I won't be so frustrated with you that I snap back' (ROW-7744) — victim-posture DARVO resolution; 'Olivia is currently at Janette's house crying cause you cancelled last minute' (ROW-7748) — child deployed as guilt weapon mid-cluster. Feb 4 (ROW-7751-7752): Melissa relays child asking 'why you used to visit everyday and now you barely do' — abandonment framing through child, no escalation.

primary_flags.summary: Jan 15 mega-cluster: scheduling dispute escalates to sustained contempt/DARVO attack. ROW-7722: 'I don't need to hear anything else from your stupid ass' — ADD-002 slur. ROW-7724-7725: first gaslight accusations deployed ('You gaslight everything'). ROW-7726: 'You are completely useless as a father. I stand by that.' — peak inadequate-father characterization; most extreme formulation in dataset to date. ROW-7730: additional gaslight accusation. ROW-7740: 'You gaslight, deflect and place blame on everyone else disappointing Olivia' — DARVO: Eli's responses reframed as gaslighting to neutralize legitimate communication. ROW-7744: 'Stop your behavior and act like a dad and responsible adult and I won't be so frustrated with you that I snap back' — DARVO resolution: Melissa's contempt attack reframed as Eli's fault; victim posture. ROW-7748: 'Olivia is currently at Janette's house crying cause you cancelled last minute.' — child deployed as guilt/shame weapon; ARC-RF04-002-S16. COMP-RF04-019 (RF-04+RF-09): gaslight accusations function as DARVO mechanism — accusing Eli of gaslighting while deploying contempt attack and reframing conflict source. ARC-RF04-001-S54; ARC-RF04-002-S16.

new_signals.summary: Jan 15 mega-cluster: peak inadequate-father characterization ('You are completely useless as a father. I stand by that.' ROW-7726) + ADD-002 slur 'stupid ass' (ROW-7722) + DARVO gaslight-inversion ('You gaslight, deflect and place blame on everyone else disappointing Olivia' ROW-7740) + victim-posture DARVO resolution 'Stop your behavior... and I won't be so frustrated with you that I snap back' (ROW-7744) + child guilt weapon (ROW-7748). COMP-RF04-019 (RF-04+RF-09).
Child guilt weapon mid-cluster: 'Olivia is currently at Janette's house crying cause you cancelled last minute.' — child's distress deployed as direct guilt/shame mechanism during contempt attack.

Child abandonment relay (peripheral): Melissa relays Olivia asked 'why you used to visit everyday and now you barely do' — child's expressed confusion weaponized as passive abandonment-framing guilt mechanism.

compound_patterns.summary: RF-04 (Emotional Manipulation) + RF-09 (Gaslighting): Melissa's repeated gaslight accusations ('You gaslight everything,' 'You gaslight, deflect and place blame on everyone else') function as a DARVO mechanism — accusing Eli of gaslighting while deploying contempt/inadequate-father attack and reframing the conflict as his behavioral fault. The gaslight accusation is itself the manipulation vector, inverting who is gaslighting whom.

cp3_item.summary: Jan 15 Sev-2 cluster: peak inadequate-father characterization ('completely useless as a father') + DARVO gaslight-inversion mechanism + child guilt weapon. Notable for: (1) most extreme inadequate-father phrasing in dataset to date; (2) gaslight accusations as DARVO tool — systematically inverts who is manipulating whom; (3) victim-posture resolution ('Stop your behavior... and I won't snap back') — Melissa explicitly conditions her contempt as Eli's responsibility. COMP-RF04-019 cross-reference to RF-09 for synthesis.
